name: Unity AI
tagline: AI-powered game development assistant built into the Unity editor
description: Unity AI (formerly Unity Muse) is an in-editor AI assistant tuned for Unity-specific workflows and grounded in project context. Launched with Unity 6.2 in 2025, it includes generative AI features for creating sprites, textures, animations, and an agentic assistant that automates tasks directly within the game engine.
creator: Unity Technologies

name: Cascadeur
tagline: AI-assisted keyframe animation software for game characters
description: Cascadeur is a standalone 3D animation software that uses AI and physics tools to dramatically speed up the keyframe animation process. Its AutoPosing neural network helps create natural poses instantly, while AutoPhysics ensures realistic motion. It supports video-to-animation mocap and integrates with Unreal Engine, Mixamo, and Daz3d.
creator: Cascadeur

name: DeepMotion
tagline: AI motion capture and body tracking from video
description: DeepMotion generates 3D animations from video in seconds through any web browser using AI-powered motion capture and real-time body tracking. Its Animate 3D API converts standard video into production-ready animations without expensive mocap hardware, making it accessible for indie developers and XR creators.
creator: DeepMotion

name: Kaedim
tagline: AI-powered 2D to 3D asset conversion for games
description: Kaedim converts 2D images into production-ready 3D models using AI, designed specifically for game development pipelines. Artists can upload concept art or sketches and receive clean, game-ready 3D meshes with textures, dramatically reducing the time from concept to playable asset.
creator: Kaedim

name: Coplay AI
tagline: AI coding assistant specialized for Unity game development
description: Coplay AI is an AI-powered coding assistant designed specifically for Unity game developers, demonstrated at GDC 2025. It understands Unity-specific patterns, C# scripting conventions, and game development workflows to help developers write, debug, and optimize game code faster than generic AI coding tools.
creator: Coplay

name: Unreal Engine PCG
tagline: AI-powered procedural content generation in Unreal Engine
description: Unreal Engine's Procedural Content Generation (PCG) framework enables developers to create vast, detailed game worlds using AI-driven procedural tools. Integrated directly into UE5, it allows artists and designers to define rules and constraints while the system generates complex levels, environments, and props at scale.
creator: Epic Games

name: REimagineHome
tagline: AI-powered virtual staging and interior design for real estate
description: REimagineHome is an AI-powered virtual staging app that has taken the real estate industry by storm in 2025. It digitally furnishes empty rooms, redesigns interiors, and creates stunning property visualizations from photos, helping agents win listings faster with photorealistic staging at a fraction of traditional costs.
creator: REimagineHome

name: Virtual Staging AI
tagline: One-click AI staging for empty property photos
description: Virtual Staging AI is a fully automated staging tool backed by Zillow that furnishes empty rooms in just 15 seconds. Upload a photo and get professionally staged results with no design skills needed, making it one of the fastest and most affordable virtual staging solutions for real estate agents.
creator: Virtual Staging AI

name: Matterport
tagline: AI-driven 3D digital twins and virtual property tours
description: Matterport leads in immersive virtual property tours using AI-driven 360° photography to build 'dollhouse' models. Its 2025 Marketing Cloud launch provides a complete hub for real estate listings including 3D tours, high-res photos, social-media-ready videos, and AI-generated property descriptions.
creator: Matterport

name: GPTBots.ai
tagline: Enterprise AI chatbot for real estate lead generation and tours
description: GPTBots.ai is an enterprise-grade AI chatbot platform built for real estate that automates customer interactions including lead generation, appointment scheduling, and virtual tour coordination. It integrates with CRMs like Salesforce and HubSpot, providing 24/7 automated engagement for property inquiries.
creator: GPTBots.ai

name: Blooma
tagline: AI-driven commercial real estate lending automation
description: Blooma automates the analysis of borrower and asset data for commercial real estate lenders, streamlining lending decisions with AI-driven insights. It ingests and processes financial documents, property data, and market comparables to accelerate underwriting and reduce manual review time.
creator: Blooma

name: Agora
tagline: AI-powered investor relations for commercial real estate
description: Agora is an AI-powered platform streamlining capital raising, investor communication, and asset oversight for commercial real estate investment firms. Features include investor portals, AI questionnaire workflows, automated onboarding, and secure document management for CRE fund managers.
creator: Agora

name: FourKites
tagline: AI supply chain orchestration and visibility platform
description: FourKites pioneered supply chain visibility and now leads orchestration with AI digital workers that create comprehensive digital twins of supply chains. In 2025 it advanced beyond visibility into intelligent control tower capabilities, enabling autonomous operations across ocean, rail, and road tracking.
creator: FourKites

name: project44
tagline: Decision intelligence platform for modern supply chains
description: project44 is the Decision Intelligence Platform for modern supply chains, named a leader in the 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for the fifth consecutive year. Its context-based AI transforms fragmented logistics management into coordinated, predictive operations across all transportation modes.
creator: project44

name: Burnt (Ozai)
tagline: Agentic AI operating system for food supply chain management
description: Burnt is building an agentic operating system for the food supply chain, with its AI agent Ozai replacing the entire order management job function at food distribution companies. Backed by Steph Curry's VC firm with $3.8M raised in 2025, Ozai automates sales and customer service workflows for distributors processing thousands of daily orders.
creator: Burnt

name: Flexport
tagline: AI-powered platform for global trade and logistics
description: Flexport is building the platform for global logistics, empowering buyers, sellers and their logistics partners with AI-powered technology. With 40,000+ customers moving nearly $19B of merchandise across 112 countries, Flexport uses AI to connect everyone in the global economy and unlock commerce across fragmented supply chains.
creator: Flexport

name: Nutrad
description: Nutrad is a Chicago-based startup tackling supply chain collaboration with AI, part of a new wave of logistics startups building alongside giants like Coyote, FourKites, and Project44. It focuses on improving collaboration between supply chain partners through AI-driven insights and automated coordination.
creator: Nutrad
